name: typing-pookie
description: A cute pookie cat companion that sits at the end of your active line. It runs while you type and sleeps when you stop coding.

typingCat.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Typing Cat companion.

typingCat.idleTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before the cat falls asleep after you stop typing.

typingCat.animationSpeed.description: Speed of the running animation (milliseconds per frame).

typingCat.catColor.description: The color theme of your cat companion.
